hero.lede: Full-stack web applications built with React, Next.js, and modern cloud infrastructure — built by our agents and shipped fast, with senior engineers reviewing every release.

pipeline.title: One brief. An agent scaffolds it. Engineers ship it.

spec.title: Scope, stack, and delivery — in writing.

specRows.label: Scope
specRows.value: SaaS platforms, e-commerce, enterprise dashboards, MVPs, APIs, and progressive web apps — full-stack, schema to deploy.

specRows.label: Timeline
specRows.value: 2–6 weeks, depending on scope — roughly 10x faster and 80% cheaper than a typical agency build.

specRows.label: Automated by agents
specRows.value: Next.js page structures, API routes, database schemas, and Tailwind component libraries, generated from a plain-English brief.

specRows.label: Reviewed by engineers
specRows.value: Every pull request, integration test, and product decision that only a person can make — before anything ships.

faqItems.question: How does AI speed up web development?
faqItems.answer: Our agents generate boilerplate code, database schemas, and component scaffolding in minutes. Human engineers then review, refine, and customize everything to your exact requirements. This eliminates repetitive work and lets us focus on what makes your product unique.

faqItems.question: Can you work with my existing codebase?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. We regularly join projects mid-stream. Our onboarding process includes a thorough code audit, and our AI agent adapts to your existing patterns, conventions, and tech stack.

faqItems.question: What does the delivery timeline look like?
faqItems.answer: Most web projects ship in 2 to 6 weeks depending on complexity. MVPs and prototypes can launch in as little as 2 weeks. Enterprise platforms with complex integrations typically take 4 to 6 weeks. You will receive weekly progress demos throughout.

faqItems.question: Do you handle deployment and hosting?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We deploy to Vercel, AWS, or your preferred cloud provider. Every project includes CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and a production-ready infrastructure setup at no extra charge.

cta.title: Ready to build your web application?
cta.lede: Tell us about your project. We'll come back with a plan, a timeline, and a fixed estimate.

pipeline.title: One brief. An agent drafts the app. Engineers ship it.

spec.title: Scope, stack, and delivery — in writing.

specRows.label: Scope
specRows.value: Business, consumer, health, education, fintech, and media apps — designed for iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch, and Catalyst.

specRows.label: Timeline
specRows.value: 4–8 weeks, depending on scope — roughly 8x faster and 75% cheaper than a typical agency build.

specRows.label: Automated by agents
specRows.value: SwiftUI views, Core Data models, networking layers, and navigation stacks — generated from your requirements, following Apple's Human Interface Guidelines.

specRows.label: Reviewed by engineers
specRows.value: UX refinement, App Store compliance, and rigorous testing on every build before it reaches your users.

faqItems.question: Do you build with SwiftUI or UIKit?
faqItems.answer: We use SwiftUI for all new projects because it provides a modern, declarative approach to UI development and is Apple's recommended framework going forward. For projects that need to support older iOS versions or require features not yet available in SwiftUI, we use UIKit or a hybrid approach.

faqItems.question: Can you submit to the App Store for us?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We manage the entire submission process including App Store Connect setup, screenshots, metadata, and review compliance. We also handle TestFlight distribution for beta testing with your team or early users.

faqItems.question: Do you support iPad and Apple Watch?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Our SwiftUI layouts adapt to iPad, Apple Watch, and even macOS via Catalyst. We design for the full Apple ecosystem from day one, so your app feels native on every device.

faqItems.question: What about in-app purchases and subscriptions?
faqItems.answer: StoreKit 2 is part of our standard toolkit. We implement subscriptions, consumables, and non-consumable purchases with server-side receipt validation. We also handle the App Store pricing and tax configuration.

cta.title: Ready to build your iOS app?

hero.title: Android Development
hero.lede: Native Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose — built by our agents and shipped fast, with senior engineers reviewing every release.

pipeline.title: One brief. An agent drafts the app. Engineers ship it.
pipeline.description: Our agents generate Compose screens and data layers in hours — senior engineers handle UX polish and Play Store compliance.

spec.title: Scope, stack, and delivery — in writing.

specRows.label: Scope
specRows.value: Business, social, e-commerce, health, education, and productivity apps — responsive across phones, tablets, and foldables.

specRows.label: Timeline
specRows.value: 4–8 weeks, depending on scope — roughly 8x faster and 75% cheaper than a typical agency build.

specRows.label: Automated by agents
specRows.value: Kotlin modules, Compose screens, Room database entities, and Hilt dependency graphs — generated from your requirements, following Google's MVVM + Repository architecture.

specRows.label: Reviewed by engineers

useCasesSection.title: Where this fits.

useCases.title: Business Apps

useCases.title: Health & Fitness
useCases.description: Wearable integrations, workout trackers, and telehealth experiences.

faqItems.question: Do you build with Kotlin or Java?
faqItems.answer: We build exclusively with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose for all new projects. Kotlin is the official recommended language for Android development, and Compose provides a modern, declarative UI toolkit. If you have an existing Java codebase, we can maintain it or help you migrate incrementally.

faqItems.question: Can you publish to the Google Play Store?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We handle the entire release process including Play Store listing, screenshots, app signing, and compliance review. We also set up staged rollouts and crash monitoring so you can ship with confidence.

faqItems.question: Do you support tablets and foldables?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. Our Compose-based layouts are responsive by default. We test on phones, tablets, and foldable devices to ensure a great experience across the entire Android ecosystem.

faqItems.question: What about offline functionality?
faqItems.answer: Room database and WorkManager are part of our standard stack. We architect every app with offline-first principles so users can keep working even without an internet connection. Data syncs automatically when connectivity returns.

spec.title: Coverage, response time, and billing — in writing.

specRows.label: Monitoring

onboardingSection.title: Three steps to your first retainer month.

onboarding.title: Audit
onboarding.detail: We review your existing codebase, infrastructure, and monitoring setup to identify risks and quick wins.

onboarding.title: Setup
onboarding.detail: We configure monitoring, alerting, CI/CD pipelines, and backup systems tailored to your stack.

onboarding.title: Launch
onboarding.detail: Your retainer begins. You get a dedicated channel for requests and a dashboard to track every issue.

faqItems.question: Can you support apps you did not build?
faqItems.answer: Yes. We regularly take over maintenance for applications built by other teams. Our onboarding audit identifies technical debt and risks so we can hit the ground running.

faqItems.question: What technologies do you support?
faqItems.answer: We support React, Next.js, Node.js, Kotlin, Swift, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Vercel, Firebase, and more. If your stack is not listed, ask us — we are happy to evaluate.

faqItems.question: How does billing work?
faqItems.answer: Support retainers are billed monthly with a fixed fee based on your chosen tier. There are no surprise charges. If an issue requires work beyond the retainer scope, we provide a quote before proceeding.

faqItems.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqItems.answer: Absolutely. You can change tiers at any time with 30 days notice. We will help you transition smoothly and adjust monitoring and SLA terms accordingly.

hero.title: An AI-first studio, built in Dhaka, shipping worldwide.
hero.lede: We build web, Android, and iOS products at startup speed with enterprise quality — agents write, senior engineers own every line that ships.

story.title: Why we started CraftsAI.
story.p1: CraftsAI was founded in 2025 with a simple thesis: most software development time is spent on repetitive, predictable tasks that AI can handle better and faster than humans.
story.p2: Based in Bangladesh, we built a studio around that idea. Our AI agents generate boilerplate code, database schemas, and component libraries while human engineers focus on architecture, product decisions, and the nuanced craft that machines cannot replicate.
story.p3: The result is enterprise-grade software delivered at a fraction of the traditional cost and timeline — without compromising on quality, security, or maintainability.

approach.title: Agents plus engineers, not agents instead of engineers.
approach.agentsBody: Our AI agents handle the repetitive coding tasks that traditionally consume most of development time. They generate clean, typed, well-structured code from plain-English requirements, following best practices for each platform.
approach.humanBody: Every line of AI-generated code is reviewed by experienced engineers. They make architectural decisions, write integration tests, handle edge cases, and ensure the final product meets production standards. AI amplifies their output; it does not replace their judgment.

line.title: How a project moves through CraftsAI.

phases.title: Discovery
phases.label: DISCOVERY
phases.what: Free consultation to understand your needs. We discuss your goals, target audience, and success criteria to make sure we are aligned before any code is written.

phases.title: Planning
phases.label: PLANNING
phases.what: Architecture design, technology selection, and milestone planning. We map out the entire project so there are no surprises down the road.
phases.deliverables: Technical spec, project timeline, cost estimate

phases.title: Development
phases.label: DEVELOPMENT
phases.what: AI agents generate code while engineers review and refine. You see working features early and often through regular demos.

phases.title: Testing
phases.label: TESTING
phases.what: Comprehensive QA, performance testing, and security audit. We catch issues before your users do.

phases.title: Launch & Support
phases.label: LAUNCH
phases.what: Deployment, monitoring setup, and handoff. We make sure everything runs smoothly and your team is fully equipped to take over.

communication.title: Transparency is how we work.
communication.description: You will always know where your project stands.

items.title: Weekly Progress Reports
items.description: Detailed updates on what was completed, what is next, and any blockers.

items.title: Direct Messaging
items.description: Reach us anytime via WhatsApp or email. No ticketing queues.

items.title: Live Demos at Milestones
items.description: See working software at every major milestone, not just at the end.

items.title: Dedicated Project Channel
items.description: A shared channel for your team and ours to keep everything in one place.

informationWeCollect.label: 01 / Information we collect
informationWeCollect.title: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: We collect information in the following ways:

items.detail: When you use our contact, quote, or demo forms we collect the details you provide — such as your name, email address, company, phone number, project requirements, and message — together with technical metadata (your IP address and browser user-agent) used for spam prevention and security.
If you are an active client, we process your account email, your projects, invoices we issue to you, and any messages you exchange with us through the portal.
We use passwordless login. To sign you in we process your email address and one-time login codes / magic links, and — if you choose “remember this device” — a trusted-device token.
If you opt in to browser notifications, we store a device push token so we can deliver them.
Where enabled and where you consent, we collect usage analytics such as pages visited and device type.

howWeUse.label: 02 / How we use your information
howWeUse.title: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect to:
items: Respond to your inquiries and provide requested services
Process and manage project quotes, contracts, and invoices
Authenticate you and secure your account and our systems
Send project updates, transactional emails, and (if opted in) push notifications
Improve our website, services, and user experience
Comply with legal obligations and protect our rights

serviceProviders.label: 03 / Service providers & data sharing
serviceProviders.title: Service Providers & Data Sharing
serviceProviders.intro: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. We share data only with the service providers needed to run our business, each of which processes it on our behalf:

items.detail: — [hosting/database provider] hosts our application and stores lead, client, project, and invoice records.
— our notification service delivers transactional email and login codes via [email delivery provider], and delivers browser push via Google Firebase Cloud Messaging.
— where enabled, Google Analytics helps us understand site usage.

serviceProviders.outro: We may also disclose information when required by law or to protect our rights, safety, or property.

cookies.label: 04 / Cookies & analytics
cookies.title: Cookies & Analytics
cookies.body: We use strictly-necessary cookies for authentication and security, and — only with your consent — analytics cookies to understand site usage. You can control cookie preferences through the consent banner and your browser settings. For more details, please review our

dataRetention.label: 05 / Data retention
dataRetention.title: Data Retention
dataRetention.body: We keep personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes above or as required by law. Indicatively: lead enquiries are retained for [retention period]; client project, invoice, and message records for [retention period, e.g. as required for tax/accounting]; and optional push tokens until you disable notifications. You can request earlier deletion as described below.

yourRights.label: 06 / Your rights
yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.bodyBefore: Depending on your location, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or export your personal data, and to restrict or object to certain processing. To exercise any of these rights — including deleting your lead record or client-portal data — email us at
yourRights.bodyAfter: from the address associated with your data. We will verify your identity and respond within 30 days.

dataSecurity.label: 07 / Data security
dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information, including encryption in transit (TLS), passwordless authentication, access controls, and separation between our public site, admin, and client-portal systems. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

contactUs.label: 08 / Contact us
contactUs.title: Contact Us
contactUs.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at

serviceTerms.label: 01 / Service terms
serviceTerms.title: Service Terms
serviceTerms.body: By engaging CraftsAI for software development services, you agree to these terms. Our services include web development, mobile application development, product customization, and ongoing support as outlined in individual project proposals. All project scopes, timelines, and deliverables are defined in a signed Statement of Work (SOW) prior to commencement.

intellectualProperty.label: 02 / Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.body: Upon full payment, all custom code, designs, and deliverables created specifically for your project are transferred to you. CraftsAI retains ownership of proprietary tools, frameworks, and reusable components developed independently of your project. We reserve the right to showcase completed work in our portfolio unless a non-disclosure agreement is in place.

paymentTerms.label: 03 / Payment terms
paymentTerms.title: Payment Terms
paymentTerms.body: Payment schedules are defined in the project SOW. Standard terms require 30% upfront, 40% at the mid-project milestone, and 30% upon final delivery. Invoices are due within 14 days of issue unless otherwise agreed. Late payments may result in project suspension after a 7-day grace period and written notice.

limitationOfLiability.label: 04 / Limitation of liability
limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.body: CraftsAI provides services on an "as is" basis to the extent permitted by law. Our total liability for any claim arising from our services shall not exceed the total fees paid for the specific project in question. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages including lost profits, data loss, or business interruption.

termination.label: 05 / Termination
termination.title: Termination
termination.body: Either party may terminate a project with 14 days written notice. Upon termination, the client is responsible for payment of all work completed up to the termination date. CraftsAI will deliver all completed work and source code for paid milestones. Refunds for prepaid but undelivered work will be issued within 30 days of termination.

governingLaw.label: 06 / Governing law
governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Bangladesh. Any disputes arising from these terms or our services shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation first, followed by binding arbitration if necessary.

contact.label: 07 / Contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at

cookieTypes.title: Essential Cookies
cookieTypes.description: Required for the site to function and stay secure. These carry your authenticated admin or client-portal session, short-lived login challenge state, an optional "remember this device" token, and your cookie-consent choice. They cannot be disabled.

cookieTypes.title: Analytics Cookies (optional)
cookieTypes.description: If — and only if — you accept analytics in our consent banner, we use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with the site (pages visited, session duration, referral sources). You can decline these, and no analytics cookies are set until you consent.

whatAreCookies.label: 01 / What are cookies
whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies
whatAreCookies.body: Cookies are small text files placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work efficiently, provide a better user experience, and supply information to site owners. Cookies may be set by the website you are visiting (first-party cookies) or by third-party services embedded on the page.

typesOfCookies.label: 02 / Types of cookies we use
typesOfCookies.title: Types of Cookies We Use
typesOfCookies.intro: We use the following categories of cookies on our website:

managingCookies.label: 03 / Managing cookies
managingCookies.title: Managing Cookies
managingCookies.body: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies, or to alert you when a cookie is being set. Please note that disabling essential cookies may affect the functionality of our website. Refer to your browser's help documentation for instructions on managing cookie preferences.

updates.label: 04 / Updates to this policy
updates.title: Updates to This Policy
updates.body: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in technology, legislation, or our business practices. The "Last updated" date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was most recently revised.

contact.label: 05 / Contact
contact.title: Contact
contact.bodyBefore: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at
contact.bodyAfter: for more information about how we handle your data.

servicesLayout.title: Our Services
servicesLayout.description: CraftsAI offers AI-powered web development, Android development, iOS development, and ongoing support.

services.title: Services
services.description: What CraftsAI builds: custom AI agents, agent-built websites and mobile apps, and agent integration into your existing systems.

servicesAndroid.title: Android Development Services
servicesAndroid.description: Native Android apps with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Material Design 3, Firebase integration — built by our AI agents and reviewed by senior engineers.

servicesIos.title: iOS Development Services
servicesIos.description: Native iOS apps with Swift and SwiftUI. Beautiful, performant, App Store ready — built by our AI agents and reviewed by senior engineers.

servicesSupport.title: Support & Maintenance Services
servicesSupport.description: Ongoing support retainers with bug fixes, security patches, performance monitoring, and feature updates. 24/7 monitoring with 4-hour response time.

servicesWeb.title: Web Development Services
servicesWeb.description: Full-stack web applications built with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and modern cloud infrastructure — built by our AI agents and reviewed by senior engineers.
